summary: Dashboard Image Fix VERIFIED - ALL TESTS PASSED. Backend API returns 44 stories with 100% non-null thumbnail_small_url and poster_url. Dashboard renders hero image from API poster_url (R2 CDN). All 30 images on Dashboard are from R2 CDN with 0 gradient fallbacks. Landing page works with no regressions. R2 CDN URLs return HTTP 200.
critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard.js line 99: Uses current.poster_url from API for hero image - CORRECT
Dashboard.js line 262: Uses story.thumbnail_small_url from API for story cards - CORRECT
Dashboard.js has NO static banner imports (getStaticHeroImg/getStaticCardImg removed)
engagement.py _shape_item() enforces non-null thumbnail_small_url and poster_url - CORRECT
Landing.js still uses webpack-bundled images from staticBanners.js - no regression
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dashboard image fix verified. Key findings: 1) API returns 44 stories with 100% non-null thumbnail_small_url and poster_url, 2) Dashboard hero uses poster_url from API (R2 CDN), 3) Dashboard story cards use thumbnail_small_url from API (R2 CDN), 4) 30 images on Dashboard all from R2 CDN, 5) 0 gradient fallbacks, 6) Landing page uses webpack-bundled images (no regression), 7) R2 CDN URLs return HTTP 200.

dashboard_story_cards_use_api_thumbnail_.details: All 5 checked cards use R2 CDN images

r2_cdn_urls_return_http_200.details: All 5 tested R2 CDN URLs return HTTP 200
